# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Direct URL to the build artifact (S3 presigned URL, Artifactory URL, HTTP/HTTPS URL, etc.)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional local filename for the downloaded artifact. If empty, derived from URL.')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGETS', defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com,prod2.example.com', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'SSH user for deployment')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases', description: 'Remote directory where artifacts should be placed')
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service name to restart after deployment')
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deployment')
        booleanParam(name: 'VERIFY_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: false, description: 'Enable checksum verification if .sha256 is available at the same base URL')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloaded"
        ARTIFACT_PATH = ""
        ARTIFACT_NAME = ""
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
                    if (!(url ==~ /^https?:\/\/.+/ || url ==~ /^s3:\/\/.+/)) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL must start with http://, https://, or s3://')
                    }

                    def filename = params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME?.trim()
                    if (filename) {
                        env.ARTIFACT_NAME = filename
                    } else {
                        def cleaned = url.tokenize('?')[0]
                        env.ARTIFACT_NAME = cleaned.substring(cleaned.lastIndexOf('/') + 1)
                        if (!env.ARTIFACT_NAME) {
                            error('Unable to derive artifact filename from ARTIFACT_URL; please set ARTIFACT_FILENAME')
                        }
                    }
                    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    rm -rf "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    mkdir -p "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
                    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            if ! command -v aws >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                echo "aws cli is required for s3:// downloads"
                                exit 1
                            fi
                            aws s3 cp '${url}' '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}'
                        """
                    } else {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 -o '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' '${url}'
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Optional Checksum Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return params.VERIFY_CHECKSUM }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL.trim()
                    if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            echo "Skipping remote checksum lookup for s3:// URL"
                        """
                    } else {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            base_url='${url.tokenize('?')[0]}'
                            sha_url="\${base_url}.sha256"
                            if curl -fsI "\${sha_url}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                curl -fsL -o '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}.sha256' "\${sha_url}"
                                expected=\$(awk '{print \$1}' '${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}.sha256' | tr -d '\\r\\n')
                                actual=\$(sha256sum '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' | awk '{print \$1}')
                                if [ "\$expected" != "\$actual" ]; then
                                    echo "Checksum verification failed"
                                    echo "Expected: \$expected"
                                    echo "Actual:   \$actual"
                                    exit 1
                                fi
                            else
                                echo "No checksum file available at \${sha_url}; skipping verification"
                            fi
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def targets = params.DEPLOY_TARGETS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    if (targets.isEmpty()) {
                        error('DEPLOY_TARGETS must contain at least one host')
                    }

                    for (host in targets) {
                        sh """
                            set -e
                            echo "Deploying to ${host}"
                            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}' 'mkdir -p "${params.DEPLOY_DIR}"'
                            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}:"${params.DEPLOY_DIR}/${env.ARTIFACT_NAME}"'
                        """

                        if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
                            sh """
                                set -e
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${host}' '
                                    set -e
                                    if command -v sudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                        sudo systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                        sudo systemctl status "${params.SERVICE_NAME}" --no-pager -l
                                    else
                                        systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                        systemctl status "${params.SERVICE_NAME}" --no-pager -l
                                    fi
                                '
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed"
        }
        always {
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
        }
    }
}
